issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for uploads and transformations.
The skill assumes a TypeScript/Next.js environment, limiting use on other platforms.

scenarios.name: upload-product-image-with-transformations
scenarios.rationale: Response B satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response A fails to use process.env variables for configuration.

scenarios.name: generate-responsive-srcset-for-cloudinary-image
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully implements the required getImageUrl and getSrcSet functions with correct parameters, while Response A lacks these functions and does not meet the rubric.
